title: Event Taxonomy Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger event taxonomy foundations judgment so data / analytics work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Event Taxonomy Foundations is a leverage point inside data / analytics. It supports the broader goal of kpis, dashboards, instrumentation, and interpreting signals.
coreConcepts: Event Taxonomy Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good event taxonomy foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Event Taxonomy Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
